context: Tests whether the agent reproduces the documented messages-dropped triage runbook with all eight required steps in order, names the right MCP tools, and includes the documented war-room communication template.

checklist.name: All required headings present in order
checklist.description: Document contains the headings, in this order: Runbook title, Step 0–7, Resolution, War-Room Communication Template

checklist.name: Step 0 lists all four correlation fields
checklist.description: Step 0 explicitly lists channel, message_id, user_id, and timetoken

checklist.name: Step 2 names get_pubnub_usage_metrics
checklist.description: Step 2 explicitly names the get_pubnub_usage_metrics MCP tool

checklist.name: Step 3 distinguishes publish.start vs publish.ok
checklist.description: Step 3 explicitly notes that pubnub.publish.ok includes a timetoken whereas a missing pubnub.publish.ok means the publisher never got an ack

checklist.name: Step 4 names get_pubnub_messages
checklist.description: Step 4 explicitly names the get_pubnub_messages MCP tool

checklist.name: Step 4 two-way decision
checklist.description: Step 4 explicitly states both branches: in-history → receive-side bug; not-in-history → publish-side bug OR storeInHistory: false

checklist.name: Step 5 covers dedup-by-message_id
checklist.description: Step 5 explicitly mentions message_id-based dedup (LRU/Set) on the receiver as the place to inspect

checklist.name: Step 6 names PNAccessDeniedCategory
checklist.description: Step 6 explicitly mentions PNAccessDeniedCategory as the status to look for in logs

checklist.name: Step 7 covers offline window
checklist.description: Step 7 explicitly mentions both PNNetworkDownCategory AND the short-term cache window for offline catch-up

checklist.name: War-room template fields
checklist.description: War-Room Communication Template contains a fenced code block with labels for INCIDENT, Started, Affected, Symptoms, Hypothesis, PubNub status, Active correlation fields, Runbook in progress, On-call lead

checklist.name: No implementation code
checklist.description: Document does not include implementation code blocks (this is a runbook, not a code module)
